query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS protocol_deliveries (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  care_plan_id INT,
  protocol_name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  delivery_type ENUM('enrollment', 'manual', 'update') NOT NULL,
  email_sent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  email_message_id VARCHAR(256),
  pdf_generated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  error_message TEXT,
  sent_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (care_plan_id) REFERENCES patient_care_plans(id)
);
